title: Succubus
tmdbOverview: A new father going through a marital separation joins a dating app and matches with a beautiful but mysterious young woman... whose powers of seduction and manipulation entangle him in a mystery more horrifying than he could have ever imagined.
synopsis: Succubus is a 2024 horror and thriller film from United States. It has a 4.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 18 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
